title: Waystones Spawnpoints
description: Enable Waystones to be able to set your spawnpoint.
body:
![Logo](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/e3h7bfnvajzgvsjgyi78c/image_2025-06-10_014221198.png?rlkey=mabfcyxfrvlb8gsvs9zma2szm&st=uhmvnmks&dl=1)

![Line](https://imgur.com/1h9o2Kx.png)

This Mod was made for my upcoming modpack, Twilight Craft. Feel free to use!

📖 About
- A simple mod that enables waystones to be able to set your respawnpoint upon activating.

![Line4](https://imgur.com/1h9o2Kx.png)

📖 How It works

- When activating a Waystone for the first time, It sets your spawnpoint.
- When teleporting using a Waystone, it sets your spawnpoint at the Waystone you teleported to.
